title: A Rainy Day in Oxford
synopsis: Rain changes a walk through Oxford into a quiet afternoon with books and old buildings.
sentences: It began to rain just as Maya and her uncle reached the centre of Oxford.
At first they tried to walk quickly between the old college buildings.
But the rain grew heavier, and soon the streets shone with water.
They opened an umbrella and laughed when the wind turned it sideways.
To stay dry, they stepped into a bookshop near a narrow lane.
Inside, the room smelled of paper and wood.
Maya wandered between shelves while drops of rain tapped softly on the windows.
Her uncle found a history book with pictures of Oxford from long ago.
When the rain slowed, they bought a postcard and walked outside again.
The stone buildings looked darker now, but also more beautiful.
Maya decided she liked Oxford in the rain almost as much as in sunshine.
Some places, she thought, become more interesting when the weather changes.
